description.short: Embrace the historical charm of Banda Aceh during your stay at Hotel AMEL. Located near vibrant markets and serene coastal views, this hotel offers a comfortable and affordable experience for two travelers. Enjoy luxury facilities like a stylish bar, rejuvenating massage therapies, and a complimentary breakfast takeaway service. The spacious and clean rooms are equipped with air conditioning, complimentary internet access, and personal in-room safes. Wake up to picturesque city or garden views and explore the variety of local food and coffee stalls nearby. Friendly staff are always ready to help make your stay memorable. Book now and experience the best value for your money at Hotel AMEL. [Some content may be Generative AI assisted. Inaccuracies may occur.]

comments.reviewComments:
We booked family room with 3 single bed. The room was very spacious, yes there are 3 single bed, but you still have space to sleep if you cary sleeping bags. If you travel with family or young children, you’d definitely want to book this room.

When we got to our room, it was clean, they placed toothbrush, soap and towel in each of the beds. The bathroom is clean even though the floor is a bit slippy, the floor just need to be brushed by the staff. 

Breakfast was decent, you won’t see omelette corner, but you can ask to the staff and they will make it for you.

At night you could find food stalls just 3 minutes walks from the hotel. They are offering variety of local food and coffee.

For those who planned to go to Sabang, the hotel location just 10 minutes away to the harbour. You can order grab car to pick you up at the hotel and drop-off at the harbour. 

Overall we‘re happy during our stay.
